creator: tharada@e-mail.jp
text:
Dear FreeBSD java developer,

I looked at my build-log, so that the segmentation fault was caused by readelf built with clang.
I re-built readelf with gcc, then re-built java/openjdk7.
No error messages were found and build was successful.

Sincerely Yours,
Takuya

On Mon, 13 Aug 2012 05:50:06 GMT
FreeBSD-gnats-submit@FreeBSD.org wrote:

> Thank you very much for your problem report.
> It has the internal identification `ports/170589'.
